# Mixture of Insights

> A hardcore hacker diary and technical blog covering deep Android system internals, ML infrastructure (Orbit), and LLM deployment optimizations on heterogenous edge devices.

## Languages
- [English (en)](/en/)
- [中文 (zh)](/zh/)

## Articles (English)
- [The Google Wallet Wall](/en/blog/01-the-google-wallet-wall)
- [Stockmask](/en/blog/02-stockmask)
- [The Logcat Leak](/en/blog/03-the-logcat-leak)
- [Auditing from the App's Eyes](/en/blog/04-auditing-from-the-apps-eyes)
- [What You Can and Can't Hide](/en/blog/05-what-you-can-and-cant-hide)
- [A Control Plane for Renting GPUs](/en/blog/a-control-plane-for-renting-gpus)
- [Cold Start, Then Climb](/en/blog/cold-start-then-climb)
- [DPO: When You Can't Afford RLHF](/en/blog/dpo-when-you-cant-afford-rlhf)
- [How Qwen3-TTS Makes a Frame](/en/blog/how-qwen3-tts-makes-a-frame)
- [Nvim Yank OSC52](/en/blog/nvim-yank-osc52)
- [Orbit: A Task-Agnostic Core](/en/blog/orbit-a-task-agnostic-core)
- [Orbit: The Bundle is the Contract](/en/blog/orbit-the-bundle-is-the-contract)
- [Paged-KV Batching Without vLLM](/en/blog/paged-kv-batching-without-vllm)
- [Post-Training is a Data Problem](/en/blog/post-training-is-a-data-problem)
- [Self-Play and the Games Models Teach Themselves](/en/blog/self-play-and-the-games-models-teach-themselves)
- [What Are You Rewarding?](/en/blog/what-are-you-rewarding)
- [When the GPU isn't an Nvidia](/en/blog/when-the-gpu-isnt-an-nvidia)
